text: Neevalay Tots Nurturing Roots, Shaping the Future Neevalay, from the Sanskrit words “Neev” (Foundation) and “Alay” (Home), symbolizes a nurturing place where little tots take root, grow, and flourish. Schedule a Personal Tour Explore Our Programs Our Pillars Research-Driven Emotionally Nurturing Global Pedagogy Child-Centric Technology-Integrated Professionally Managed Our passion is childhood, and we’re in Neevalay At Neevalay Tots – A Research-Driven Global Preschool, inspired by the words “Neev” (foundation) and “Alay” (home) and guided by the belief that strong foundations shape strong futures, we aspire to create an environment where curiosity, creativity, confidence, and compassion flourish — empowering children to become thoughtful, innovative, and responsible citizens of tomorrow. Contact Now All in One The Neevalay Enrichment Experience Beyond academics, our enrichment programs nurture creativity, confidence, empathy, and curiosity — ensuring whole-child growth through over 20,000+ hours of research and integration of global best practices in early childhood education. Each program is thoughtfully designed to engage children’s minds, hearts, and hands — fostering joy, imagination, and lifelong learning. Art & Creative Expression Encouraging imagination, problem-solving, and fine motor skills through open-ended art, craft, and design projects inspired by the Global frameworks. Music & Movement Building rhythm, coordination, and joy through singing, dancing, and creative movement—developing body awareness and self-confidence. title: Timings and daily hours · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay Tots is open **Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM**. Half-day and full-day options are available across our programmes, and daycare extends through the day for working parents. For the exact schedule that suits your child's age and your routine, our team will gladly walk you through the options — reach us on WhatsApp or book a visit.

title: Programmes and ages · Neevalay Tots
text: We welcome children from about 2 to 8 years across a play-based, developmentally staged path: - **Playgroup** — 2 to 3 years - **Nursery** — 3 to 4 years - **Kindergarten (KG1 & KG2)** — 4 to 6 years - **Daycare** — full-day care for 2 to 6 years - **Enrichment** — specialised programmes for 3 to 8 years Each stage is designed around the child's developmental needs, blending structured learning with joyful, hands-on play.

title: Our teaching approach · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay's pedagogy is **child-centric, research-driven and play-based**, inspired by the **Montessori and Reggio Emilia** methods and aligned to India's National Curriculum Framework for the Foundational Stage (**NCF-FS 2022**) and **NEP 2020**. We nurture the whole child — cognitive, language, social-emotional, physical and creative development — through exploration, curiosity and warm, individual attention, rather than rote learning.

title: How to book a visit · Neevalay Tots
text: The best way to experience Neevalay is to visit us. You can **book a campus visit** through our enquiry form, message us on **WhatsApp**, or call our team — we'll find a convenient time and show you around. A visit lets you see the classrooms, meet our educators, and ask everything you'd like about your child's day with us.

title: How admissions work · Neevalay Tots
text: To apply, you can fill in our **admission form** online, and our team will guide you through the next steps — a campus visit, a warm interaction with your child, and confirming a place. We're happy to explain the whole process on a call or over WhatsApp so it feels simple and unhurried.

title: Fees and payment · Neevalay Tots
text: Fees vary by programme, age group and schedule (half-day, full-day or daycare). So that you get accurate, current numbers for your child's specific plan, our team shares the fee details directly — please reach us on WhatsApp or book a visit and we'll walk you through everything transparently.

title: Safety, hygiene and care · Neevalay Tots
text: Your child's safety and wellbeing are at the heart of everything we do. Our environment is designed to be secure, clean and nurturing, with caring educators supervising throughout the day.

title: Location and branches · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay Tots is located in **New Delhi**. For the exact address, directions, and the branch nearest you, our team will be glad to help — reach us on WhatsApp or call, and we'll point you the right way.

title: Contact us · Neevalay Tots
text: You can reach the Neevalay Tots team on **WhatsApp / phone at +91 97117 52584**, by email at **hello@neevalay.com**, or through the website **neevalay.com**. We're here Monday to Saturday and always happy to help you and your little one.
